EMPLOYEE HANDBOOK — Acme Corp

For purposes of this Handbook, "eligible employee" means a full-time employee
who has completed 90 days of continuous service.

All eligible employees accrue paid time off at a rate of 15 days per calendar
year.

Remote work refers to any work performed off-site, including hybrid
arrangements where the employee splits time between home and the office.

The Company will reimburse approved business travel expenses up to $5,000 per
calendar quarter.
